title: Even Witches Fall Off Their Brooms!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
You wanna see some magic? Eh, I guess I can give
you a treat since I'm in a good mood.

text_block_list.name: Ritto Dorm Resident
text_block_list.text: Wow, thanks! Ooh, I can't wait!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Acacia, cassia, sansevieria! Friendship! Endure
fowebber—

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Ahehe-HEM! That does it for the vocal warm-up!
Time for the real deal!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: What the heck?! I can say it! I swear I can say the spell!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After trying countless times to pronounce her
spell, Sweep Tosho ends up throwing a tantrum.
